title: tracing::warn message "upgrade failed" inaccurate for post-handshake StreamEnded
description: "WebSocket upgrade failed {N} times without a successful frame" is emitted even when the TCP/WS handshake succeeded but send_stream_enable or next_frame subsequently failed. "upgrade" specifically means the HTTP→WS handshake; the message misleads any developer reading logs who assumes the failure is at the HTTP level. Suggested rewrite: "WebSocket connection failed {N} times without a successful chat-stream frame; disabling ephemeral events"
